name: Pacific Oak Strategic Opportunity REIT, Inc.
summary: Pacific Oak Strategic Opportunity REIT, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated real estate investment trust formed in 2008 that invests in and manages a diverse portfolio of opportunistic real estate, real estate equity securities, and other real estate-related investments. Its portfolio includes office complexes, residential homes, apartments, and land parcels, as well as joint ventures and stock in publicly traded real estate companies. Operations are managed by Pacific Oak Capital Advisors, LLC, with residential homes managed by the PORT Advisor.

products.name: Office Properties
products.description: Commercial office complexes generating rental revenue from tenants across multiple markets.

products.name: Residential Homes Portfolio (PORT)
products.description: Single-family residential homes managed through subsidiary Pacific Oak Residential Trust, Inc.

products.name: Apartment Investments
products.description: Multifamily residential apartment properties held as part of diversified real estate portfolio.

products.name: Land Parcels
products.description: Land sites available for future development being monetized as part of investment strategy.

products.name: Real Estate Equity Securities
products.description: Investments including stock of publicly traded real estate companies.

products.name: Joint Ventures
products.description: Co-investment ventures with institutional investors in diversified commercial real estate assets.

partnerships.description: Affiliated advisor managing day-to-day operations, investments, asset management, and investor relations.
Subsidiary of Second Avenue Group manages the residential homes portfolio held through PORT.
